```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement data mesh architecture principles"
---
# Data Mesh
## Task
Apply data mesh principles to data architecture.
## Requirements
1. Define domain-oriented data ownership. 2. Treat data as a product.
3. Implement self-serve data platform. 4. Apply federated governance.
5. Define data product interfaces (APIs, schemas).
## Constraints
- Each domain owns its data products. Platform enables self-serve. Governance is federated.
## Success Criteria
- Domains own data. Data products well-defined. Platform enables autonomy. Governance works.
```
